summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FairFare Production Readiness V1 features for iOS App Store submission. All features working correctly: Privacy Policy page (/privacy), Terms of Service page (/terms), Footer with Privacy/Terms links, Back button navigation on legal pages, Capacitor configuration for iOS, App icon SVG files, No Uber/Lyft logos (text-only references), Main app functionality (compare rides), Recommendation banner, Deep link buttons.
passed_tests: Frontend: Main page loads at / with 200 status
Frontend: Privacy Policy page accessible at /privacy with 200 status
Frontend: Terms of Service page accessible at /terms with 200 status
Frontend: Footer displays Privacy and Terms links
Frontend: Footer shows copyright '© 2026 FairFare. All rights reserved.'
Frontend: Privacy link navigates to /privacy correctly
Frontend: Terms link navigates to /terms correctly
Frontend: Back button on Privacy page returns to main page
Frontend: Back button on Terms page returns to main page
Frontend: Privacy page has 9 content sections
Frontend: Terms page has 11 content sections
Frontend: Privacy page shows 'Last updated: March 2026'
Frontend: Terms page shows 'Last updated: March 2026'
Frontend: Privacy page has contact email (privacy@fairfare.app)
Frontend: Terms page has contact email (legal@fairfare.app)
Frontend: Terms page has 'No Affiliation' disclaimer for App Store compliance
Frontend: Compare rides functionality works correctly
Frontend: Recommendation banner displays with actionable advice
Frontend: Decision hint displays with situational context
Frontend: FairFare Pick card visible
Frontend: Uber and Lyft cards visible
Frontend: 'Continue in Uber' deep link button present
Frontend: 'Continue in Lyft' deep link button present
Frontend: 'Live price shown in app' message displayed
Frontend: Traveler-friendly demand labels (Good time to ride) displayed
Frontend: Surge Likelihood indicator displayed
Frontend: Unfinished features (Ride for someone else, Surge Guard) hidden in UI
Config: Capacitor config (capacitor.config.json) is valid JSON
Config: Capacitor appId is 'com.fairfare.app'
Config: Capacitor appName is 'FairFare'
Config: iOS-specific settings configured (contentInset, allowsLinkPreview, scheme)
Config: SplashScreen and StatusBar plugins configured
Assets: app-icon.svg exists in public folder
Assets: icon-192.svg exists in public folder
Assets: icon-512.svg exists in public folder
Assets: splash.svg exists in public folder
Assets: No Uber/Lyft logos found (PNG/JPG images)
Assets: No Uber/Lyft logo references in source code
Assets: No Uber/Lyft branding in SVG files
Config: manifest.json properly configured with icons
Config: index.html has iOS meta tags (apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-touch-icon)
Backend: API root endpoint returns 200 OK
Backend: /api/compare-rides returns valid response with estimates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production readiness V1 features verified working: 1) Privacy Policy page at /privacy with 9 sections, 2) Terms of Service page at /terms with 11 sections including 'No Affiliation' disclaimer, 3) Footer with Privacy/Terms links and copyright, 4) Back button navigation on legal pages, 5) Capacitor 6 configured for iOS builds (com.fairfare.app), 6) App icon SVG files in public folder, 7) No Uber/Lyft logos - text-only references for App Store compliance, 8) Main app functionality (compare rides) working, 9) Recommendation banner and deep link buttons functional, 10) Unfinished features (Ride for someone else, Surge Guard) hidden for V1 release. Backend is entirely MOCKED - no real Uber/Lyft API calls.
mocked_api_note: Backend is entirely MOCKED - no real Uber/Lyft API calls. Decision engine uses time-based heuristics for demand/surge indicators.
